summary: v3.0.6-beta reorganizes the project into clean source, asset, data, legal, and documentation folders. It also removes the old Alpha-era run batch file and updates the Windows build script cleanup behavior. Calculation and layout behavior are unchanged.
notes: Reorganized project files into src, assets, data, legal, and docs folders.
Removed run_bravo_fires_fdc.bat because it was an Alpha-era carryover.
Updated the Windows build script to build from the new src folder.
Updated the Windows build script to include assets, data, legal files, and CHANGELOG.md.
Added build-script cleanup for the downloaded v3.0.6 ZIP when found in the repo folder or parent folder.
No calculation or layout behavior changed.
